---
format: html
title: get_model_tuning_param_for_scale_and_resolution()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>get_model_tuning_param_for_scale_and_resolution</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Get One Model Tuning Parameter For Scale And Resolution</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Returns one active model-fitting tuning parameter. Spatial stores read
per-scale tuning from the model tuning CSV files; non-spatial stores
fall back to scalar values from 'config.yml'.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>get_model_tuning_param_for_scale_and_resolution(
  param_id,
  scale_id = get_scale_id_from_store(),
  resolution_id = NULL,
  config_file = here::here("config.yml"),
  dir = here::here("Data/Input/Model_tuning")
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="param_id">param_id</code></td>
<td>
<p>A single model tuning parameter name. Must be one of 'n_iter',
'n_step_size', 'n_sampling', 'n_samples_anova', or
'n_early_stopping'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="scale_id">scale_id</code></td>
<td>
<p>Optional spatial unit identifier. Defaults to
'get_scale_id_from_store()'. When 'NULL', values are read from
'config.yml'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="resolution_id">resolution_id</code></td>
<td>
<p>Optional model resolution. Defaults to the active
'data_processing$taxonomic_resolution' config value. Spatial stores
pass this to 'get_model_tuning_params()'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="config_file">config_file</code></td>
<td>
<p>Path to the YAML configuration file.
Default: 'here::here(&quot;config.yml&quot;)'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="dir">dir</code></td>
<td>
<p>Directory containing model tuning CSV files.
Default: 'here::here(&quot;Data/Input/Model_tuning&quot;)'.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>The requested parameter value. Optional tuning parameters may return
'NULL'.
</p>


<h3>See Also</h3>

<p>get_model_tuning_params
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
